name: C2xGetTokenLengthBit
title: C2xGetTokenLengthBit
syntax: long C2xGetTokenLengthBit( long packet, char protocolDesignator[], char tokenDesignator[] );
description: This function returns the length of a token in bit.

parameters.name: packet
parameters.description: Handle of a packet that has been created with C2xInitPacket

return:
Length of the token in bit
With C2xGetLastError you can check if the function has been processed successfully.
